title: Mrs. Brown, You've Got a Lovely Daughter
original_title: Mrs. Brown, You've Got a Lovely Daughter
overview: Herman inherits a greyhound and decides to make his fortune by dog racing. After traveling from Manchester to London in the hope of entering a national invitational, Herman and his friends find work in a pop group, and Herman falls in love.
